title: Your First Salary Hike
scenario: You get a 15% raise — about ₹7,500 more a month. Your instinct is to finally upgrade your lifestyle. What do you do with the extra?

choices.label: Upgrade my lifestyle to match
choices.lesson: If every raise instantly becomes higher spending, you never actually get ahead — your costs simply rise with your income.

choices.label: Step up my SIP with the raise
choices.lesson: Directing most of each raise into investments — before you get used to the money — is one of the most powerful wealth habits.

concept: Step-up investing & raises vs lifestyle creep
